settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Orders ship within 3–7 working days (excluding Fridays and Saturdays), to every governorate in Egypt. Please don't open your parcel until the courier hands it to you.

settings.question: How do I get the free 5ml?
settings.answer: Spend over 1,100 LE in a single order and pick any free 5ml from our Free Gift collection — 27 scents to choose from.

settings.question: What's the difference between the oil and the spray?
settings.answer: The oil (roll-on) is more concentrated and longer-lasting on skin; the spray diffuses more and is easier to layer. Many customers keep both.

settings.question: Can I try before buying a full bottle?
settings.answer: Yes — most scents have a 5ml tester so you can live with the fragrance before committing to 30ml or 50ml.

settings.question: Can I return or exchange a perfume?
settings.answer: Because fragrance is personal-care, we don't accept returns or exchanges. Try the 5ml tester first if you're unsure — most scents have one for 85 LE.
